publishedAbstract: * Nodes hosting Gluster pods in Openshift Container Storage, are facing `Disk pressure`events, leading to pod evictions: 15s 15s 1 glusterfs-pod1 Pod Warning Evicted kubelet, node1.example.cm The node had condition: [DiskPressure]. 14s 14s 1 glusterfs-pod1 Pod Warning Evicted kubelet, node1.example.com The node had condition: [DiskPressure]. * At the same time, a `sosreport`with the `--all-logs`option was being collected. * Why is the node facing disk pressure for the collection of a sosreport? How to avoid these events?
publishedTitle: Why are Openshift Container Storage Nodes Observing 'Disk Pressure' Events When a Soseport is Being Collected?
